name: Stony Creek Golf Course, Restaurant & Banquet Facility
about: Stony Creek Golf Course is a multi-faceted venue that combines a traditional golf course with indoor simulation and social amenities. The facility features an 18-hole golf course, a 52-station driving range, 2 full swing golf simulators, an 18-hole miniature golf course, and a full-service restaurant and bar with banquet facilities. Catering to both serious golfers and casual players, the venue offers PGA instruction, leagues for adults and juniors, and hosts outings, weddings, and other events. With its combination of outdoor golf, indoor technology, and dining options, it serves as a comprehensive destination for golfers of all skill levels looking to practice, play, or socialize.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive golf facility with both outdoor and indoor options
Affordable pricing that provides great value for the amenities
Variety of activities including simulators, mini golf, and instruction for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full service restaurant and grill available on-site
Full bar available at the restaurant and banquet facilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify whether club rentals are available, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs when visiting.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service restaurant and bar, but doesn't specify if outside food and drink are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulators?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the duration for 18 holes on the simulators.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly with features including a miniature golf course, junior leagues, and banquet facilities suitable for family events.
